# Welgo · Tucson Short-Term Rental Management + Book Direct

> Welgo manages short-term vacation rentals in Tucson, Arizona. Guests book direct and save up to 15% versus Airbnb and VRBO. Homeowners, real estate firms, and family offices hand Welgo their property to run like a hotel: pricing, guests, cleaning, repairs, with a 15% revenue-lift guarantee or fees refunded.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://welgo.space/): Tucson STR management + direct guest booking
- [For Homeowners](https://welgo.space/homeowners.html): Pricing (6% / 12% / 18.5%), earnings calculator, 15%-or-refund guarantee, $1M/$3M protection
- [Book a stay](https://welgo.space/guests.html): Direct booking, Tucson + Woodland Park + Manila, save up to 15%
- [Results](https://welgo.space/results.html): 26 homes, 61% occupancy, $29,314 avg gross/home, $131 ADR
- [Who's behind Welgo](https://welgo.space/about.html): Local operator, hospitality across 3 countries
- [Switching managers](https://welgo.space/switch.html): Leaving Vacasa / Evolve
- [Contact](https://welgo.space/contact.html): Free home analysis, ed@welgo.space

## Facts
- Location: Tucson, Arizona, USA
- Audiences: property homeowners, real estate firms, family offices (management) + guests (direct booking)
- Guarantee: 15% revenue lift in 6 months or management fees refunded
- Booking: direct at welgo.space, no platform booking fees
